hero_headline: The Saving App That Helps You Reach Any Goal
hero_subheadline: Create a piggy bank, save with a plan or at your own pace, and watch your progress grow. Akluma keeps you on track with reminders so you never miss a saving day.
use_case_vacation_desc: That trip you keep dreaming about; start saving for it today
use_case_gadgets_desc: That new phone or laptop; closer than you think
use_case_milestones_desc: Wedding, new baby, or the next big step; save without stress
use_case_emergency_desc: Because life happens; build your safety net, one saving at a time
use_case_learning_desc: Course fees, certifications, or that degree; invest in yourself
use_case_home_desc: New sofa, kitchen upgrade, or your first place; make it yours
two_ways_scheduled_desc: Set a goal, pick a schedule, and let Akluma keep you on track.
two_ways_scheduled_bullet_1: Set a target amount for your piggy bank
two_ways_scheduled_bullet_2: Pick a date or enter how much you can save
two_ways_scheduled_bullet_3: Get email reminders on saving days
two_ways_classic_desc: No schedule, no pressure. Add money when you want, withdraw when you need.
two_ways_classic_bullet_3: Watch your total grow over time
feature_reminders_desc: Automatic email reminders on your saving days; stay consistent without thinking about it
feature_progress_desc: See exactly how close you are to your saving goal with a visual progress bar
feature_flexible_desc: Follow a saving schedule with reminders, or go classic and add money whenever you want; your call
feature_currency_desc: Save in USD, EUR, GBP, TRY, XOF, and XAF; works wherever you are
feature_free_desc: No subscriptions, no credit card; start tracking your savings today at no cost
feature_privacy_desc: We never sell your information; your saving goals are yours alone
Updated by user actions (marking as save: Tracks changes to status, amount, or date only
Name: Your name
update_profile_information: Update your account's profile information and email address.
saving_goal_reach_date: Date you will reach your goal

pick_date_strategy_definition: Decide the date you want to reach your saving goal. Then, we will show you how much money you need to put aside on a regular basis to reach that goal.
enter_saving_amount_strategy_definition: Tell us how much money you want to put aside periodically, then we will tell you when you will reach that goal.
saving_amount_whole_numbers_only: You can put only numbers in this field. No comma, no dot, no letters
price_whole_numbers_only: You can put only numbers in this field. No comma, no dot, no letters
Final Total: Final amount you will have when you open your piggy bank
Extra Savings Tooltip Info: We rounded your savings amount to avoid dealing with fractional contributions in your periodic deposits. This extra amount comes from that adjustment.
Extra Savings Tooltip Info For Enter Sav: You'll save slightly more than needed because your periodic amount doesn't divide evenly into the target. This extra ensures you reach your goal.
paused_message: Piggy bank is paused. Activate it first to change the status of your savings.
piggy_bank_paused_info: You paused saving. When you decide to continue, simply activate your piggy bank.
piggy_bank_resumed_schedule_updated_info: You resumed your piggy bank and schedule updated.
You have successfully completed your sav: You have successfully completed your savings goal.
edit_cancelled_message: You cancelled editing. The changes you made weren't saved.
saving_reminder_message: This is a reminder for your saving #:saving_number of :amount :currency for your piggy bank ":piggy_bank_name" scheduled for today (:date).
saving_reminder_additional_message:
When you’ve put this amount aside, click the button above to open your piggy bank. If you’re not already logged in, you’ll be asked to sign in first.

Once you are on your piggy bank page, scroll down to the “Saving Schedule” table near the end and check the box next to your saving to mark it as complete.

If you haven’t saved yet, you can always come back and mark it later.
saving_reminder_unsubscribe_notice: If you would like to stop receiving these reminders, you can update your notification preferences in your piggy bank settings.
account_deleted: Your account and all your data are gone. The last traces in encrypted database backups and our email provider's logs are fully purged within 45 days.

saving_marked_as_unsaved: Saving marked as pending! Pending items are shown at the top of your schedule (before completed items).
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Akluma (www.akluma.com). This is a personal project by Ubeydullah Keleş. The site is free to use.
terms.eligibility_text: You must be at least 13 years old to use Akluma. By using the site you confirm that you meet this requirement.
terms.can_do_text: You can create virtual piggy banks to help yourself save money. You set your own goals, schedule savings, and optionally get reminder emails based on your schedule.
terms.cant_do_text:
When using Akluma you agree not to:

• spam, scrape, or send automated traffic to the site
• try to crash, overload, or interfere with the service (for example by repeatedly creating and deleting piggy banks)
• reverse-engineer, copy, or redistribute the site or its code
• create fake accounts or share your account with others
• upload malicious content or use the service for anything illegal
terms.termination_text: I reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these terms or that I reasonably believe is harming the service or other users. Whenever possible I will let you know first and give you a chance to export your data.
terms.data_text: You can delete your account at any time from your profile. See the Privacy Policy for how I collect, store, and delete your data.
terms.ip_text: The Akluma name, code, design, and content are mine. The data you enter (your piggy banks, savings schedules, and transactions) is yours.
terms.guarantee_text: Akluma is a personal project provided free of charge and offered 'as is'. I do not guarantee uptime, data availability, or that the service will be error-free. I am not liable for any loss of data or any consequential damages from using or being unable to use the service. Use at your own discretion.
terms.stores_text: If you install or access Akluma through a third-party store (for example Google Play), that store's terms also apply in addition to these.
terms.governing_law_text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Turkey. If you are a consumer in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another jurisdiction with mandatory consumer protection laws, those protections still apply to you regardless of this clause.
terms.changes_text: You’ll be notified by email if I make any significant changes to these terms.
terms.contact_linkedin: or reach out on LinkedIn to
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collect_text: When you sign up I collect: your name, email address, password (hashed), timezone (read from your browser), preferred language, preferred currency, and notification preferences. I also store the date you accepted these terms. If you sign in with Google, I additionally collect your Google account ID and your public profile picture URL.
privacy.why_text: To create your account, send reminders, and help you stick to your saving schedule.
privacy.emails_text: You’ll receive login-related and optional reminder emails. You can turn off reminders anytime in your profile.
privacy.cookies_text: Only essential cookies for login and session handling.
privacy.thirdparties_text:
I rely on a few external services to run Akluma:

• Postmark: receives your name and email address to deliver login and reminder emails. Postmark retains delivery logs (recipient, subject, delivery status) for around 45 days per their own policy.

• Google Sign-In: if you sign in with Google, Google shares your name, email, profile photo URL, and Google account ID with Akluma. Akluma does not send any data back to Google.

• Fly.io: hosts the database and application servers in Paris, France. All your data lives here. Encrypted database backups are retained for 5 days.

• Google Search Console: receives anonymized aggregate traffic data from search engines. No personal data.
privacy.children_text: This site is not meant for children under 13. I do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If you're a parent and believe your child signed up, contact me and I will delete the account.
privacy.storage_text: Your data is hosted on Fly.io servers in Paris, France. I keep your data while your account is active. When you delete your account, all personal data is permanently removed from the live database immediately. Encrypted database backups are rotated within 5 days. Email delivery logs at Postmark are purged within 45 days. After that, no trace of your data remains.
privacy.security_text: Passwords are hashed using bcrypt and never stored in plain text. Not even I can read them. The site is HTTPS-secured using Let's Encrypt certificates.
privacy.deletion_text:
You can delete your account and all your data at any time:

• In-app: click your name in the top-right corner, then Profile, scroll to the bottom, click DELETE ACCOUNT, and type DELETE to confirm.

• If you can't access your account: email contact@akluma.com from the email address tied to your account and I will delete it within 30 days.

Deletion is immediate from the live database. See 'Data Storage and Retention' above for the timeline on encrypted backups and provider logs.
privacy.rights_text:
You can view, edit, or delete your personal data through your profile (see 'Account Deletion' above). To request a copy of your data, email contact@akluma.com.

If you live in the EU or UK, you have additional rights under GDPR: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. Email me to exercise any of these.
privacy.changes_text: If the policy changes, I’ll notify you by email.
privacy.contact_linkedin: or reach out on LinkedIn to
auth.accept_terms: I agree to the Terms of Service.
auth.accept_privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy.

about.meta_description: Akluma is a free savings tracker app that helps you set goals, track progress, and save money with automatic reminders. Built by a solo developer who needed it himself.
about.heading: About Akluma
about.what_text_1: Akluma is a free saving app built around one idea: pick a goal, make a plan, and stick to it. It's a savings tracker that shows you exactly how close you are to your target and sends you email reminders so you never forget a saving day.
about.what_text_2: You can use it as a money saving planner with a fixed schedule (daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly), or go classic and add money at your own pace. Either way, you see your progress grow in real time.
about.what_text_3: It works in six currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, TRY, XOF, XAF) and three languages (English, Turkish, French). No subscriptions, no credit card, no hidden fees.
about.why_text_1: I wanted a simple app to help me save money for specific goals. Not a full budgeting platform, not a bank product. Just a straightforward savings goal app that tells me how much to save, when to save it, and how far I've come.
about.why_text_2: I looked for apps to help save money this way and couldn't find one that worked without connecting a bank account or paying a monthly fee. So I built Akluma.
about.how_step_1: Create a piggy bank and set your savings goal
about.how_step_2: Choose your saving plan (pick a target date or set a regular amount - daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly) or go classic with no schedule
about.how_step_3: Akluma calculates what you need to save each time and sends automatic reminders
about.how_step_4: Track your progress with a visual bar that fills up as you get closer
about.how_cta_text: You can try it without even creating an account.
about.who_text_1: I'm Ubeydullah Keleş, a software developer from Istanbul, Türkiye. Akluma is a personal project, not a company product. I built it because I needed it myself, and I keep improving it because other people find it useful too.
about.who_text_2: Akluma is currently 100% free. I'm focused on making it genuinely helpful before thinking about anything else. If you find it useful, the best way to support the project is to use it and tell others about it.
about.contact_text: Have a question, a suggestion, or just want to say hi? Drop me an email or send a message on LinkedIn.
